example_cases.description: init creates DB file with 0600 permissions (owner read/write only)
example_cases.expected_output: DB file created. File permissions are exactly 0600. Parent dir ~/.stash/ has 0700.

example_cases.description: init verifies permissions on existing DB and resets if wrong
example_cases.input: init(db_path) where existing DB file has 0644 permissions
example_cases.expected_output: Permissions corrected to 0600. DB opened successfully.
example_cases.setup: Create DB file with chmod 0644 before calling init.

example_cases.description: insert_raw_prompt stores a RawPrompt record and returns its UUID v7 ID
example_cases.input: insert_raw_prompt({ context_id, source_type:'claude_jsonl', content:'fix the bug', file_path:'/path/to/sess.jsonl' })
example_cases.expected_output: Returns a valid UUID v7 string. Record retrievable from DB with all fields matching input.
example_cases.setup: Init DB. Create a context first.

example_cases.description: Raw prompts are immutable — UPDATE and DELETE operations on raw_prompts table fail (INV-001)
example_cases.input: After inserting a raw prompt, attempt: (1) UPDATE raw_prompts SET content='modified' WHERE id=X, (2) DELETE FROM raw_prompts WHERE id=X
example_cases.expected_output: Both operations are rejected (trigger or constraint violation). Original record unchanged.
example_cases.setup: Init DB. Insert one raw prompt. Attempt direct SQL UPDATE and DELETE.

example_cases.description: insert_intent stores an Intent record with all fields
example_cases.input: insert_intent({ context_id, tier:'narrative', content:'Fixing auth module error handling', source:'auto', is_direction_change:false })
example_cases.expected_output: Returns UUID v7 ID. Record in DB with all fields matching.

example_cases.description: upsert_context creates a new Context when none exists for the directory
example_cases.expected_output: Returns { id: UUID v7, created: true }. Context row exists in DB.
example_cases.setup: Init DB with empty contexts table.

example_cases.description: upsert_context updates existing Context's status and updated_at
example_cases.input: upsert_context with same directory as existing context but status='done'
example_cases.expected_output: Returns { id: existing_id, created: false }. Status updated to 'done'. updated_at refreshed.
example_cases.setup: Init DB. Insert a context with status='running'.

example_cases.description: get_pending_prompts returns unprocessed raw prompts for a context
example_cases.expected_output: Returns prompts created after the last intent, count=3
example_cases.setup: Insert context, 2 old prompts linked to an intent, then 3 new unlinked prompts.

example_cases.description: get_stale_intents returns narrative intents older than specified threshold
example_cases.expected_output: Returns only intents with tier='narrative' AND created_at < threshold AND archived=false
example_cases.setup: Insert 5 narrative intents: 3 older than 4h, 2 recent. 1 older but already archived.

example_cases.description: get_stale_intents returns summary intents older than 3 days
example_cases.expected_output: Returns only summary intents older than 3 days, not archived
example_cases.setup: Insert mix of summary intents with various ages.

example_cases.description: archive_intents marks intents as archived but does NOT delete them (INV-001 spirit)
example_cases.expected_output: Returns count=3. All 3 intents have archived=true. Records still exist and are queryable.

example_cases.description: get_config / set_config roundtrip stores and retrieves arbitrary key-value pairs
get_config for nonexistent key returns null
example_cases.setup: Init DB with no config entries.

example_cases.description: Single-row insert operation completes within 5ms (NFR performance)
example_cases.setup: Init DB with WAL mode. Pre-create a context.

example_cases.description: WAL mode enabled for concurrent read/write support
Concurrent read during write does not block (WAL mode verification)
example_cases.input: Spawn 2 threads: one writing 50 prompts, one reading intents concurrently
example_cases.expected_output: Both threads complete without SQLITE_BUSY errors. Reader sees consistent snapshots.
example_cases.setup: Init DB. Seed with some intents. Run concurrent read/write.

example_cases.description: init with permission denied on directory returns PermissionDenied error
example_cases.input: init(db_path='/root/stash.db') where process has no write access
example_cases.setup: Use a directory that the test process cannot write to.
